item.title: Are you stuck?- A dump.
item.description:
The majority of these don't need to be unmuted. I've put the ones that need, or would be better with, sound at the end and one that might be considered NSFW last.
Unmute from here down.
Those subtitles are shit but I think some of you will need them.

item.title: Resist
item.dc:creator: AwesomeDad420

item.title: Don't forget.
item.description: American friends, Canadians will never hate YOU. But we will hate your leader. We will hate your politics. We will hate your policies. Generally, we love our way of life and we love being your neighbour, but we have NO intention to ever be the "51st state". When this is all said and done, and that Candied Yam that you have running your country finally rots, you'll still be invited to the block party. And we will work it out over beers and poutine.
item.dc:creator: ohgodthehorror

item.title: Not shocked, just pissed off... The likes of Rittenhouse walking free while Luigi is being treated like this is only more proof it only matters who you kill not that you killed. Get him a fair trial!

item.title: Punk
item.dc:creator: Multipass

item.title: He's a fun drunk, though.
item.description: He's still got a box of beer left, but he said he'd try not to buy more after it's out. If he doesn't quit, I won't be upset. I'm happy he's going to give it a try, though. Edit: He usually just drinks three beers in the evenings. When he gets drunk, it's not very often at all. I don't think he has a huge drinking problem. I used to, though! I quit because I'd black out almost every time.
item.dc:creator: Zinfandella

item.title: I LOVE HOW THIS ONE CAME OUT!
item.description: Yet another small portrait for my series of portraits of people I've met in bars and discos: Creatures Of The Night. I really love how this one came out! If you'd like to support me: ---› One-time donations: paypal.me/anisjerbi ---› Monthly donations: patreon.com/anis_jerbi_art To commission an artwork from me, contact me here on imgur or via my official website: anisjerbi.com
